title: Isaocat's Old Combat Mod
description: Lets you spam swords again and axes cannot be spammed. Add compatibility by tagging heavy weapons with "forge:axes"
body:
Lets you spam swords again and axes cannot be spammed.

Add compatibility by tagging heavy weapons with "forge:axes" 

Compatible with my other mod Isaocat Utilities: https://modrinth.com/mod/isaocat-utilities
